name: Blitz Kuchen
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, flavoring, and salt.
2. Add the sugar and milk to the flour mixture and mix until well combined.
3. Beat the egg yolks in a separate bowl, then add them to the flour mixture along with the butter.
4. Gently fold in the beaten egg whites, taking care not to overmix.
5. Grease a shallow pan and pour the batter into it.
6. Dot the top of the batter with small pieces of butter.
7. Sprinkle sugar, cinnamon, and chopped nuts evenly over the top.
8. Place the pan in a moderate oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) and bake until set.
9. If baked too quickly, the nuts may sink to the bottom of the cake.
